title: Fable 5 is never coming back, here's why
summary: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and frames this as marking the beginning of a permanent underclass. The video discusses open-source AI and includes sponsorship and personal promotion links.
writeup: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and argues this marks the beginning of a permanent underclass. The video connects the ban to a broader discussion of open-source AI. It also carries sponsorship and personal promotion links.
